the Invigilators

the Invigilators

Aural Homework 032

2021-11-14 • London, UK

Length

1:14:09

We're back sooner rather than later with another episode! Another set on vinyl with some more trance classics for you to listen to :)

Tracklist

  • #01 Jan Johnston - Flesh (Tilt's Going Home Mix) [Perfecto]
  • #02 Menno de Jong - Guanxi [Anjunabeats]
  • #03 Mono - Rise [Armada]
  • #04 Moonstone - Galaxia (Solarstone Remix) [Heat]
  • #05 Agnelli & Nelson - Everyday [Xtravaganza]
  • #06 Maor Levi - Shapes (Oliver Smith Remix) [Anjunabeats]
  • #07 Tiesto - Urban Train (Marc O'Tool Dub) [VC Recordings]
  • #08 Nic Chagall - What You Need [High Contrast]
  • #09 Lost Tribe - Gamemaster (Lost Tribe's '99 Mix) [Hooj Choons]
  • #10 Daniel Kandi - Soraya [Fundamental]
  • #11 The Thrillseekers with York & Asheni - Daydream (Will Atkinson Dreamy Mix) [Adjusted Music]
  • #12 Above & Beyond - Tri State (Robert Nickson Remix) [Anjunabeats]

Aural Homework 031

2021-07-02 • London, UK

Length

1:44:13

Only a year between drinks... Here's another Aural Homework edition recorded in London, again after Luke's bday - this time in 2021. A vinyl selection of classic trance tunes, some of which we've probably played before.

Tracklist

  • #01 Way Out West - Killa (Orkidea Mix) [Solaris]
  • #02 Johan Gielen - Okinawa Sunset (Tom Cloud Remix) [Maelstrom]
  • #03 The Thrillseekers pres. Hydra - Amber [Adjusted Music]
  • #04 Rapid Eye - Circa Forever (Pedro del Mar vs. DJ Shah Remix) [ATCR]
  • #05 Kirsty Hawkshaw meets Tenishia - Outsiders (Cosmic Gate Remix) [Armind]
  • #06 Above & Beyond pres. Tranquility Base - Razorfish (Bart Claessen 2007 Rework) [Anjunabeats]
  • #07 Super8 & Tab - Needs To Feel [Anjunabeats]
  • #08 The Thrillseekers feat. Aruna - Waiting Here For You (Breakfast Club Mix) [Adjusted Music]
  • #09 Terry Ferminal - Deep Inside (Re-Work) [High Contrast]
  • #10 Above & Beyond - Can't Sleep [Anjunabeats]
  • #11 Sunlounger - In & Out (DJ Shah Rework) [A State Of Trance]
  • #12 P.O.S. - Gravity [Anjunabeats]
  • #13 Tenth Planet - Ghosts [Nebula]
  • #14 Rusch & Murray - The Promise [Anjunabeats]
  • #15 Super8 - Alba [Anjunabeats]
  • #16 Delerium - Underwater (Above & Beyond's 21st Century Mix) [Nettwerk]

Aural Homework 030

2020-07-19 • London, UK

Length

0:55:05

Right. So. Really into full 2020 mode now. Pandemic upon us, we managed to find a small window in which we could meet up and get some tunes together. And in a new change or scenery too!

Tracklist

  • #01 Svenson & Gielen - Beachbreeze (Remember The Summer) (Beachbreeze Mix) [Dance Jive]
  • #02 Andain - Summer Calling (DJ Dazzle's R.A.F. Remix) [Black Hole UK]
  • #03 Kyau vs. Albert - Made Of Sun (KvA Hard Dub) [euphonic]
  • #04 DT8 Project - The Sun Is Shining (Down On Me) (Darren Tate Dub) [Spinnin']
  • #05 Breakfast - The Sunlight [Flashover]
  • #06 Mike Foyle vs. Signalrunners - Love Theme Dusk (Signalrunners Sunrise Mix) [Armind]
  • #07 Dogzilla - Without You [High Contrast]
  • #08 Insigma - Open Your Eyes (Goldenscan Remix) [ATCR]
  • #09 Nitrous Oxide - Amnesia [Anjunabeats]

Aural Homework 029

2020-03-01 • London, UK

Length

1:12:28

Another Invigilators mix, this time off the back of spending Friday evening at a nice small music venue near King's Cross in London listening to the sounds of Tinlicker playing a nice intimate set.

Tracklist

  • #01 Lemon & Einar K - Hope (Alex Byrka Remix) [Flashover]
  • #02 Darren Tate vs. Jono Grant - Let The Light Shine In (Drival Remix) [Armada Captivating]
  • #03 Orkidea - Forward Forever (Indecent Noise Remix) [Pure Trance NEON]
  • #04 Dan Thompson - Spectrum [Nocturnal Animals]
  • #05 Rapid Eye - Circa Forever (Sean Tyas Remix) [Armada Captivating]
  • #06 Lost In Noise - Heeding The Call [Who's Afraid Of 138?!]
  • #07 Scot Project - H (Hypnotize) [Outburst]
  • #08 Tastexperience - Time (Madwave Remix) [Black Hole]
  • #09 Solarstone & Robert Nickson - Voyager II (Club Mix) [Black Hole]
  • #10 Les Hemstock - Ascension (2019 mix) [Neural Music]
  • #11 Sean Tyas & John Askew - Unkonscious [VII]
  • #12 Giuseppe Ottaviani - Moscow River [Black Hole]
  • #13 Simon O'Shine & Ahmed Romel - The Love Potion (Aly & Fila Remix) [Future Sound Of Egypt]

Aural Homework 028

2019-05-06 • London, UK

Length

1:27:58

It's May and the Invigilators have got to work on mixing up another vinyl mix for you, with a bunch more classics for you to get sunk into!

Tracklist

  • #01 Alex M.O.R.P.H. & Rank1 - Life Less Ordinary (Rafael Frost Remix) [High Contrast]
  • #02 Matt Darey feat. Marcella Wood - Beautiful (John Johnson Remix) [Incentive]
  • #03 Ralphie B - Disclosure [In Trance We Trust]
  • #04 Perpetuous Dreamer - Dust.Wav (Armin van Buuren's Rising Star Mix) [Armind]
  • #05 Daniel Kandi - Child [Anjunabeats]
  • #06 Lemon & Einar K - Hope [Flashover]
  • #07 Mirco de Govia - Epic Monolith [Xtravaganza]
  • #08 Super 8 & Tab - Suru [Anjunabeats]
  • #09 Andy Moor & Adam White pres. Whiteroom - The White Room [Liquid Asset]
  • #10 Above & Beyond - Good For Me (Darren Tate Remix) [Anjunabeats]
  • #11 Gouryella - Ligaya (Original Instrumental Mix) [Tsunami]
  • #12 Stoneface & Terminal - Super Nature (Giuseppe Ottaviani Remix) [euphonic]
  • #13 Vincent De Moor - Fly Away (Sean Tyas Remix) [Combined Forces]
  • #14 O'Callaghan & Kearney - Exactly [Discover]
